diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -1,86 +1,5 @@
 import torch

 import torch.nn as nn

-import math

-

-class DKT(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):

-        super().__init__()

-        self.num_skills = num_skills

-        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)

-        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

-        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

-        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

-        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

-        

-    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

-        interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills

-        x = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

-        x = self.dropout(x)

-        h, _ = self.lstm(x)

-        h = self.dropout(h)

-        logits = self.out(h)

-        return logits

-

-class DKT_GRU(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):

-        super().__init__()

-        self.num_skills = num_skills

-        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)

-        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

-        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

-        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

-        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

-        

-    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

-        interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills

-        x = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

-        x = self.dropout(x)

-        h, _ = self.gru(x)

-        h = self.dropout(h)

-        logits = self.out(h)

-        return logits

-

-class DKT_Concat(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):

-        super().__init__()

-        self.num_skills = num_skills

-        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

-        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

-        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

-        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

-        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

-        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

-        

-    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

-        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)

-        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)

-        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)

-        x = self.dropout(x)

-        h, _ = self.lstm(x)

-        h = self.dropout(h)

-        logits = self.out(h)

-        return logits

-

-class DKT_Concat_GRU(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):

-        super().__init__()

-        self.num_skills = num_skills

-        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

-        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

-        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

-        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

-        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

-        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

-        

-    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

-        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)

-        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)

-        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)

-        x = self.dropout(x)

-        h, _ = self.gru(x)

-        h = self.dropout(h)

-        logits = self.out(h)

-        return logits

 

 class DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):

@@ -108,7 +27,7 @@
         logits = self.out(h)

         return logits

 

-class DKT_TargetEmb(nn.Module):

+class DKT_TargetAttention(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):

         super().__init__()

         self.num_skills = num_skills

@@ -116,26 +35,38 @@
         self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

         rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

         self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

-        self.target_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

+        

+        self.target_skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

+        self.attention = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=hidden_dim, num_heads=4, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)

+        self.query_proj = nn.Linear(embed_dim, hidden_dim)

+        

         self.out = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(hidden_dim + embed_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

             nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)

         )

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

         

-    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, next_skills):

+    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, target_skills):

+        B, T = skill_ids.shape

+        

         s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)

         c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)

         x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)

         x = self.dropout(x)

+        

         h, _ = self.gru(x)

-        h = self.dropout(h)

         

-        target_e = self.target_emb(next_skills)

-        target_e = self.dropout(target_e)

+        q_emb = self.target_skill_emb(target_skills)

+        q = self.query_proj(q_emb)

         

-        combined = torch.cat([h, target_e], dim=-1)

+        causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=skill_ids.device) * float('-inf'), diagonal=1)

+        

+        attn_out, _ = self.attention(query=q, key=h, value=h, attn_mask=causal_mask)

+        

+        combined = torch.cat([h, attn_out], dim=-1)

+        combined = self.dropout(combined)

+        

         logits = self.out(combined).squeeze(-1)

         return logits

-    if model_type == 'DKT':

-    elif model_type == 'DKT_Concat_GRU':

-        model = DKT_Concat_GRU(num_skills, embed_dim=embed_dim, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, dropout=dropout).to(device)

-    elif model_type == 'DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut':

+    if model_type == 'DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut':

         model = DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut(num_skills, embed_dim=embed_dim, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, dropout=dropout).to(device)

-    elif model_type == 'DKT_TargetEmb':

-        model = DKT_TargetEmb(num_skills, embed_dim=embed_dim, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, dropout=dropout).to(device)

+    elif model_type == 'DKT_TargetAttention':

+        model = DKT_TargetAttention(num_skills, embed_dim=embed_dim, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, dropout=dropout).to(device)

         

     model.load_state_dict(checkpoint['model_state_dict'])

     model.eval()

@@ -54,7 +46,7 @@

-            if model_type in ['DKT', 'DKT_GRU', 'DKT_Concat', 'DKT_Concat_GRU', 'DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut']:
